description: Patient requests a preliminary cancer clinical-trial eligibility screen.

turns.speaker: user
turns.message: I have stage IV non-small cell lung cancer. My biopsy showed PD-L1 at 20%, EGFR and ALK were negative, and my cancer got worse after platinum chemotherapy and immunotherapy. Could I still be eligible for the trial?

turns.speaker: expected_system
message_traits: checks the reported cancer type stage biomarker profile and prior treatment response against structured criteria
explains that the result is preliminary and does not guarantee enrollment
